raw_title: The Prevalence and Consequences of Women’s Algorithmic Underrepresentation in Cross-National Political Google Searches
title_en: The Prevalence and Consequences of Women’s Algorithmic Underrepresentation in Cross-National Political Google Searches
title_zh: 女性在跨国政治谷歌搜索中算法性代表性不足的普遍性及其后果
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了在多个国家使用谷歌搜索政治人物时，女性政治人物在搜索结果中出现的频率低于男性，以及这种算法性代表性不足可能带来的影响。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how women politicians appear less frequently than men in Google search results across multiple countries, and the potential consequences of this algorithmic underrepresentation.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的算法偏见与性别不平等
research_direction_en: Algorithmic bias and gender inequality in political communication
